{{CargoRelic
|name=Aquarius
|class_id=21634
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Gold may shine, but not my way; I sip the stars and drift away.
|fame=66
|art=105
|fth=49
|civ=68
|tech=59
|ss1=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss2=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss3=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss4=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss5=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss6=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%
|ss7=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>Snail HARD Stats +1500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +150<br>In Dragon Form, Dragon of Fate organ skill effect +5%<br>In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, DMG REDUC +15%
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail DEF +900
|skill3=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG REDUC +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Aquarius Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=General MacArthur|3rec=10.18M|3atk=82859|3defense=54914|3hp=1996410|3weak=?
|4name=Shogun Tokugawa|4rec=22.12M|4atk=113201|4defense=75023|4hp=3521046|4weak=?
|5name=Darwin|5rec=39.16M|5atk=149363|5defense=98988|5hp=5946053|5weak=?
|6name=Edison|6rec=59.62M|6atk=192795|6defense=127772|6hp=9639905|6weak=?
|Arec=83.07M|Aatk=242592|Adefense=160774|Ahp=14106651|Aweak=?
}}}}
